summary: P1.1/P1.2/P2 Feature Testing Complete - Admin Content Builder UX enhancements and binding panel verified. Backend APIs for layout builder (9/9 tests passed). Home and Search runtime integrations stable.

issues: Shows 'Content Builder Aktif' test text block - should be replaced with production content

critical_code_review_comments: AdminContentBuilder.js has 80 data-testid attributes - excellent test coverage
P1.1 UX: Row move up/down and column move left/right controls present with proper data-testid
P1.2 Binding Panel: All controls (fetch/bind/unbind) implemented with data-testid
P2 WizardContainer: listing_create_stepX runtime mapping implemented with fallback safety (wizard-runtime-layout-wrapper)
Console shows i18n missing key warnings but not blocking functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1.1/P1.2/P2 features verified. Admin Content Builder at /admin/site-design/content-builder has: (1) P1.1 UX enhancements - row Yukarı/Aşağı buttons, column ←/→ buttons, drop indicators with bg color change; (2) P1.2 Binding Panel - category binding management with Aktifi Getir, Bu Page'i Bağla, Binding Kaldır buttons; (3) Draft Save/Publish still working. Home and Search runtime layouts stable. WizardContainer has listing_create_stepX support with wizard-runtime-layout-wrapper data-testid.

P1.1_row_drag_drop_indicator.details: Row drag indicator with border-slate-900 bg-slate-50 style when dragOverRowId matches. Drop indicator div shows 'Satırı buraya bırak' text.

P1.1_column_drop_indicator.details: Column drop indicator with bg-amber-50 border-amber-400 style when dragOverColumnId matches. Shows 'Bileşeni bu sütuna bırak' text.

P1.1_row_move_controls.details: Row has 'Yukarı' (moveRow up) and 'Aşağı' (moveRow down) buttons with data-testid admin-content-builder-row-move-up-{id} and admin-content-builder-row-move-down-{id}

P1.1_column_move_controls.details: Column has '←' (moveColumn left) and '→' (moveColumn right) buttons with data-testid admin-content-builder-move-column-left-{id} and admin-content-builder-move-column-right-{id}

P1.2_binding_panel.details: Binding Panel with: Binding Category ID input (admin-content-builder-binding-category-input), Aktifi Getir button (fetchActiveBinding), Bu Page'i Bağla button (bindCurrentPage), Binding Kaldır button (unbindCurrentCategory)

P1.2_binding_fetch_active.details: GET /api/admin/site/content-layout/bindings/active endpoint tested - returns binding or null

P1.2_binding_bind_page.details: POST /api/admin/site/content-layout/bindings endpoint tested - creates binding successfully

draft_save_publish.details: Draft Kaydet and Publish buttons present and functional with proper data-testid

P2_listing_create_stepX_runtime.details: WizardContainer uses useContentLayoutResolve with pageType='listing_create_stepX'. Has safeListingRuntimePayload that ensures default-content component is present for fallback safety.

home_search_runtime_regression.details: Home page shows runtime layout (Content Builder Aktif). Search page with 1000 results and list/map views working. Category search (konut) loads properly.

data_testid_coverage.details: AdminContentBuilder.js: 80 data-testid attributes. WizardContainer.js: 9 data-testid attributes including wizard-runtime-layout-wrapper for P2 feature.

ui_tests_executed: Admin Content Builder page load - SUCCESS
P1.2 Binding Panel visible with all controls - SUCCESS
Canvas with Row/Column move controls - SUCCESS
Save Draft and Publish buttons present - SUCCESS
Home page runtime layout - SUCCESS (shows Content Builder Aktif)
